title: pleione humilis
intro: Pleione humilis, also known as the Chinese orchid, is a type of terrestrial orchid native to the Himalayas and China. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Pleione humilis include its potential to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and alleviate digestive problems. The herbal preparations of Pleione humilis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
